summary: Recording source unknown, but the show is mixed – a sloppy first set and a hotter second set highlighted by a tasty Bob & Brent jam into drums.
review: The reviewer rates the concert four stars, noting that while the overall performance is pretty good, it suffers from sloppiness, especially in the first set which they call a "hot mess." The second set improves and includes an enjoyable Bob‑Weir and Brent‑Mydland jam leading into the drums. No specific comments on the recording quality are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it praises the show overall with a 4‑star rating despite calling parts sloppy, and gives no recording details, leading to an estimated rating just below four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on sound quality; assumed acceptable given the overall positive star rating.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as a "hot mess" (sloppy), second set noted as hotter but still messy, with a highlighted jam by Bob and Brent into the drums.

band_member_comments.Bob: Positive mention of a tasty jam by Bob Weir leading into drums.
band_member_comments.Keys: Positive mention of Brent Mydland's contribution to the jam.
band_member_comments.Drums: Jam into drums noted as a highlight.
